name: Sara Lee's Crumb Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sifted flour, sugar, and margarine until crumbly.
2. Set aside half a cup to the remaining crumb mixture. Add the remaining ingredients (milk, additional flour, baking powder, and cinnamon) to the bowl. Beat well with a mixer on low speed.
3. Spread the mixture evenly in a greased 8-inch square pan. Sprinkle the reserved crumbs over the top.
4. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes or until an inserted toothpick comes out clean.
5. Dust the warm cake with powdered sugar before cutting.
